description:
The image captures a serene night scene in a living room bathed in darkness. The room is illuminated by a soft orange glow from two windows on either side of the room. On the left, a window draped with white curtains lets in a gentle light that dances on the glass surface. To its right, another window, this one covered with yellow curtains, mirrors the scene from its own perspective.

In front of these windows stands a coffee table, its surface adorned with a blue candle and a white vase, silent witnesses to many nights spent in quiet contemplation. The furniture around them is shrouded in darkness, their forms barely discernible against the night.

The room itself is painted in shades of black, creating a stark contrast that only serves to highlight the glowing windows and the objects on the table. Despite the darkness, there's an air of tranquility that permeates the scene, as if inviting you to sit down, light the blue candle, and lose yourself in thought while watching the world go by outside the windows.
